cfg.enabled.name: Enabled
cfg.enabled.desc: Master switch. When on, every FlowScript the game loads is dumped to BepInEx/plugins/FlowScriptDumper/dump/.
cfg.dump_resources_folder.name: Dump Resources Folder
cfg.dump_resources_folder.desc: Run Resources.LoadAll<FlowScript>("FlowCanvas") once on main menu open and dump everything under that folder.
cfg.dump_scene_attached_scripts.name: Dump Scene-Attached Scripts
cfg.dump_scene_attached_scripts.desc: Walk FlowScriptEngine._scripts and dump each FlowScriptController graph. These are the engine-driven globals attached to the gameplay scene.
cfg.hook_get_graph.name: Hook CustomFlowScript.GetGraph
cfg.hook_get_graph.desc: Postfix CustomFlowScript.GetGraph so any flow script loaded by name at runtime also gets dumped (catches anything that is not under Resources/FlowCanvas/).
cfg.write_reference_sidecars.name: Write Reference Sidecars
cfg.write_reference_sidecars.desc: Alongside each <name>.json, write <name>.refs.tsv listing what each _objectReferences[i] entry points at (type + Unity object name). Lets you resolve "$ref":N tokens in the JSON.
cfg.pretty_print.name: Pretty Print
cfg.pretty_print.desc: Indent the JSON for readability. Off: write the raw single-line string the game stored.
